title: [codereview-1] limits.h should be included directly in adapter.h
description: The new LICHEN_MESHCORE_BLE_FRAME_MAX is defined in limits.h. While pulled in via codec.h -> adapter.h include chain, direct #include <lichen/meshcore/limits.h> in adapter.h makes the dependency explicit and robust against future refactors. P4 modularity/maintainability. Discovered during first codereview pass on m1it fix.
